name: RCB OE TL.Z./STRABAG
summary: STRABAG SE is an Austrian-based construction company that provides a range of construction services, including building construction, civil engineering, transportation infrastructure construction, and special construction. The company operates primarily in Europe but also has operations in other parts of the world and is headquartered in Spittal an der Drau, Austria. Strabag's business model involves securing construction contracts through bidding processes and executing projects using its in-house resources and subcontractors.
